description: Product SpecificationMade of 100% polyester for enhanced durability and waterproofingRoomy inner laptop compartmentFront pocket to hold all essentialsNylon bonded thread for long lifeHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyWash careDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
